hero.title: Hairspray
hero.reason: In honor of National Music Day, we celebrate the energetic musical numbers and inspiring story of self-expression in Hairspray, a film that brings people together through the power of music and dance.
hero.blurb: With its catchy soundtrack and lively performances, Hairspray is a must-see for music lovers and fans of upbeat musicals. The film's message of inclusivity and acceptance makes it a great choice for National Music Day, promoting unity and joy through the universal language of music.

released.title: Evan Almighty
released.reason: Released today in 2007, this family-friendly comedy starring Steve Carell still brings laughter and heart with its hilarious take on a modern-day biblical story.
released.blurb: Evan Almighty is a lighthearted, entertaining film that combines humor with a touching message about faith and family. With its talented cast, including Steve Carell and Morgan Freeman, this movie is a fun watch for audiences of all ages.

birthday.title: Edward Scissorhands
birthday.reason: Happy birthday to Chris O'Donnell, born June 22, 1970, who stars in this classic Tim Burton film as the friendly and charming Kim Boggs, showcasing his early acting talent in a unique and captivating story.
birthday.blurb: Edward Scissorhands is a beautifully crafted, poignant tale of acceptance and kindness, featuring stunning visuals and memorable performances. Chris O'Donnell's portrayal of Kim Boggs adds to the film's charm, making it a beloved classic among audiences.

awful.title: I Know Who Killed Me
awful.reason: This psychological thriller, starring Lindsay Lohan, is notoriously known for its convoluted plot and poor execution, making it a prime example of a dumpster dive movie with terrible reviews.
awful.blurb: I Know Who Killed Me is a mind-bogglingly bad film that fails to deliver on its intriguing premise, instead providing a messy and unsatisfying viewing experience. With its low ratings and scathing reviews, this movie has become a cautionary tale of how not to make a thriller.
